items.title: SEC and CFTC Reschedule Joint Event on Harmonization, U.S. Financial Leadership in the Crypto Era

items.title: SEC Charges ADM and Three Former Executives with Accounting and Disclosure Fraud
items.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission today filed settled charges against Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (ADM) and its former executives, Vince Macciocchi and Ray Young, and a litigated action against its former executive Vikram Luthar, for …
items.ai_score_reason: Major enforcement action against a Fortune 500 company and multiple executives for accounting fraud with settled and litigated charges indicates significant corporate misconduct and policy enforcement with potential market impact.

items.title: SEC Appoints New Chairman and Board Members to PCAOB
items.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission today announced the appointment of Demetrios (Jim) Logothetis, as Chairman, and Mark Calabria, Kyle Hauptman, and Steven Laughton, as Board members, of the Public Company Accounting Oversight Board (PCAOB). George…
items.ai_score_reason: PCAOB leadership appointments represent significant policy influence over auditing standards and corporate governance oversight, with potential market-wide implications for how public companies are audited and regulated.

items.title: SEC Announces 45th Annual Small Business Forum to Improve Capital-Raising Policy
items.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission will host the agency’s 45th Annual Government Business Forum on Small Business Capital Formation at SEC headquarters in Washington, D.C., on March 9 from 1 p.m. to 5 p.m. ET. The event will be webcast live. …
